untranslatable_reason: This signal requires institutional cash reserve data and linear regression analysis vs. short-term interest rates. Neither mutual fund cash levels nor interest rate data are available in the allowed indicator set. The signal also requires calculating predicted values from a 252-day rolling regression, which is a statistical model output rather than a standard technical indicator. The allowed indicators do not include cash flow, sentiment, or macro-fundamental data required for this strategy.
translation_notes: Signal ID: ARONSON_DRY_0_0 is a macro-fundamental mean-reversion strategy based on the Fosback Index (mutual fund cash reserves divergence from predicted levels). This requires: (1) institutional cash reserve time series, (2) short-term interest rate data, (3) linear regression modeling capability, and (4) standardized deviation calculations on model residuals. These are incompatible with a price-action and technical indicator-only engine. To implement this signal, the backtest engine would need to support external data sources (cash reserves, interest rates) and custom statistical model outputs.
